title: Equipment Expansion: Silly Style
description: A light-hearted mod that gives the Ender Dragon and Wither a bunch of useful loot!
body:
End Expansion: Silly Style or E2S2 adds new gear to minecraft, which is obtained from the Ender Dragon, Wither, and in some cases crafted. 

Features: 
- Dragon Loot - The Ender Dragon will now drop a treasure bag when killed, Terraria Style. Every player within 150 of the Dragon when it dies will recieve a treasure bag, which by default drops pieces of a new armor set, items to upgrade the armor, and rarely, an item used to craft a powerful sword.
- Ender Armor - Ender Armor drops rarely from a new mob, the Ender Knight, which spawns in the end, but never on the center end island.
- Dragon Armor - Dragon Armor is superior to Netherite, but is not fireproof and has lower durability. Rare drops from the ender dragon can be used to apply modifiers to this armor set, as well as the Ender Armor.
- Modifiers - The Ender Dragon may drop a body part that can be used to upgrade pieces of Ender and Dragon Armor. The Dragon Claw gives +2 damage, the Dragon Heart gives +3 health, and the Dragon Wing gives +10% speed. Ender Knights drop the smithing template needed for applying a modifier.
- Wither Blade - The Wither will also drop a treasure bag for every player within 50 blocks on death, and by default this bag will contain Nether Star Shards, 5 of which can be crafted into a full nether star, but the treasure bag also has an extremely rare chance to drop a sword, which can be upgraded with a Wither Cog of your choice to make a powerful weapon that comes in 4 different colors! Wither Skeletons will drop the smithing template with a 1% chance.
- Scarlet Armor - The Wither's treasure bag will also drop parts of its skeleton, which are used to craft a set of armor with low defensive stats, but +16 to your base damage once the armor is upgraded to it's final tier. However, this will require vast quantities of items from the nether, measuring several hundred thousand items.

The loot tables of the treasure bags can be edited with Datapacks, making this mod a useful way to keep the Ender Dragon's loot in one place, rather than falling out of the sky.

This mod draws HEAVY inspiration from Hypixel Skyblock and Deltarune
